query: UPDATE site_content SET value = 'Essence of Duality is the debut crossover jazz album by Cologne-based sitarist Hindol Deb. The album explores and crosses the boundaries of jazz and Indian classical music, making aesthetic connections between the two. It is a sincere attempt to move beyond the exotic yet stereotypical image of the sitar in the West, and of world-Jazz fusion in particular. The album is the logical result of Hindol''s move to Germany in 2015, in search of new sounds and compositional styles.' WHERE `key` = 'album_description' AND lang = 'en';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user Wg62LHv8T9gmqCR.b56787b7e8cc --database CkSftNg6dhe8eA5RvHqPG3 --execute UPDATE site_content SET value = 'Essence of Duality is the debut crossover jazz album by Cologne-based sitarist Hindol Deb. The album explores and crosses the boundaries of jazz and Indian classical music, making aesthetic connections between the two. It is a sincere attempt to move beyond the exotic yet stereotypical image of the sitar in the West, and of world-Jazz fusion in particular. The album is the logical result of Hindol''s move to Germany in 2015, in search of new sounds and compositional styles.' WHERE `key` = 'album_description' AND lang = 'en';
